landing.title: Operation Prompt & Co.
landing.tagline: Welcome to the only project at Verve that will never be audited.
landing.subtitle: You cracked the code — but can you guess what happens next?

vibe.helper: no wrong answers — just react and keep moving
vibe.closeTitle: That's enough conspiracy for one day.
vibe.closeSubtitle: Whatever it actually is — you're early. Step through.

rumours.text: Verve ab Chand pe apni pehli advisory branch kholne ki planning kar raha hai?
Kya hum balance sheets, finance aur Saffron ke saath khud ka share market index launch karne wale hain?
Ye kya sun rahe — Verve ab Public, ya seedha Mars pe listing me ja raha hai?
Maybe we're secretly building a Time Machine so everyone can finally 'buy back' all their time?
Kya Verve ab Big 4 ko acquire karne wala hai?
Ya phir… kya hum apni history ka sabse bada, sabse crazy Workation plan kar rahe hain?
Kya Verve ab Anthropic — Claude ko acquire karne wala hai?
You've only unlocked Level 1. Keep your eyes on your inbox — this project is just getting started.
Suna hai humari agli team meeting Mars pe hone wali hai, Elon Musk ki sponsorship ke saath?
Kya Verve ab apna khud ka crypto coin 'VerveCoin' launch karne wala hai?
Suna hai hum Nifty 50 ko replace karke 'Verve 50' index bana rahe hain?
Suna hai CA institute ka naya syllabus ab Verve decide karne wala hai?
Kya hum secretly RBI ko tax planning sikha rahe hain?
Kya hum poora US hi kharid rahe hain?
Are we outsourcing all our audits to aliens on Mars?
Kya hum dollar ka rate 1000 karne wale hain?
Suna hai agle saal se ITR file karne pe clients ko return mein Netflix subscription milega?
Kya Verve ab Swiss Banks ki audit karne wala hai?
Kya 'Buy Back Time' scheme mein company humein apne clones banane de rahi hai?
Suna hai hum apna khud ka OTT platform launch kar rahe hain: 'Verveflix'?
Kya hum advisory ke saath Bollywood movies bhi produce karne wale hain?
Are we sponsoring the next IPL team: 'The Verve Avengers'?
Kya office ke terrace pe daily commute ke liye ek helipad ban raha hai?
Suna hai desh ke agle budget ki speech humari team likh rahi hai?
Kya Elon Musk humse time management aur delegation seekhne aa raha hai?
Suna hai hum survival mindset se bahar nikalne ke liye ek private island kharid rahe hain?
Kya Verve ab apna khud ka country banane wala hai, jiska apna passport hoga?
Suna hai humare servers data security ke liye Jupiter pe shift ho rahe hain?
Kya ab se emails likhne ke baad kabootar se bheje jayenge, for that 'vintage' feel?

signIn.title: Sign in to begin.
signIn.subtitle: Confirm it's really you with your Verve account — then we point you to your crew. No passwords.
signIn.checkEmail: We emailed a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below — the code keeps you right here (no need to leave the page).

brief.title: If you choose to accept it.
brief.quote: Listen closely, recruit. Your crew isn't who you sit with every day — I've scrambled finance, HR, ops and IT into something new. You'll find them not by their desk, but by what makes them them. The quirks. The hobbies. The little legends. Light up every canister on your wheel, and the real adventure begins.

guess.title: Guess your crew.
guess.subtitle: Read each clue and name the colleague it points to. A correct call marks them yellow — but a canister only turns green when you and that teammate guess each other.
guess.pendingNote: You may be right about {name} — but it depends on what they guess. Their canister turns green only when {name} guesses you back.
guess.confirmedNote: Confirmed! You and {name} guessed each other — both canisters are green. 💚
guess.wrongNote: Not quite — read the clue again and try another name.
guess.partDoneSubtitle: Nice work. Your matches turn green the moment those teammates guess you back — watch the wheel.
guess.completeSubtitle: Every canister is green — the whole crew guessed each other. Stand by, recruit — the next transmission is already on its way.
